basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate and Project Assistants Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) Recruitment 2026: National Institute of Technology Warangal has released the official notification for 4 Research Associate and Project Assistants posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation is applicable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Women and Physically challenged candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: PHD in Computer Science (Thesis submitted also considered), First class with not less than 60% aggregate (or) not less than 6.5 CGPA on a 10 point scale in B. Tech./B.E in CSE/ECE, First class with not less than 60% aggregate (or) not less than 6.5 CGPA on a 10 point scale in Bachelor degree
qualification.details: Research Associate: PHD in Computer Science (Thesis submitted also considered), and First class with not less than 60% aggregate (or) not less than 6.5 CGPA on a 10 point scale in B. Tech./B.E in CSE/ECE. Project Assistant: First class with not less than 60% aggregate (or) not less than 6.5 CGPA on a 10 point scale in Bachelor degree.

salary_details.details: Research Associate: ₹75,000 per month (consolidated) Project Assistant: ₹25,000 per month (consolidated)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 04-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate and Project Assistants posts is 04-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Research Associate and Project Assistants?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced by NIT Warangal for these positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Project Assistant position, candidates must have a Bachelor's degree with First Class and not less than 60% aggregate or 6.5 CGPA on a 10-point scale.

faq.question: Q4. Is there an application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Research Associate and Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 35 years, with age relaxation applicable for certain categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate post will receive a consolidated salary of ₹75,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply via email by sending their complete application along with necessary documents.

faq.question: Q9. Does NIT Warangal offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation up to 5 years is provided for SC/ST/OBC/Women and Physically challenged candidates.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article.
